metadata.title: Alesvia | The Human Baseline
metadata.description: Alesvia is an institutional platform dedicated to preserving human autonomy and setting healthy boundaries in the age of conversational AI.

hero.title: Setting the human baseline in an automated world.
hero.description: Alesvia is an institutional platform dedicated to preserving human autonomy through research, education, and ethical technology initiatives. We provide the intellectual and financial foundation for a more humane digital future.

ecosystem.label: The Ecosystem
ecosystem.title: Action-driven initiatives governed by human-centric principles.
ecosystem.unplugged_desc: A program focused on establishing healthy boundaries, intentional friction, and digital detox protocols against highly persuasive AI.
ecosystem.policy_desc: Research and advocacy translating our ethical framework into actionable legislative and corporate guidelines.
ecosystem.education_desc: Curricula and workshops for schools and institutions to teach algorithmic literacy and digital self-defense.
ecosystem.advisory_desc: Bridging VC funds, institutional investors, and Tier-A AI startups to ensure the ethical deployment of conversational AI.

financing.label: Institutional Grounding
financing.title: Transparent Financing & Partnerships
financing.description: To build infrastructure that resists misaligned incentives, Alesvia is structured to prioritize long-term human value over short-term engagement. We rely on strategic grants, philanthropic partnerships, and institutional backing to fund Unplugged and future initiatives.
